hooks.command: bash -c 'ARGS="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$ARGS" | grep -q "gh pr create"; then if ! echo "$ARGS" | grep -qiE "closes? #[0-9]+|fixes? #[0-9]+|resolves? #[0-9]+"; then echo "⚠️ BLOCKED: PR must include \"closes #N\" in the body to link GitHub issues. Add issue references before creating the PR." >&2; exit 1; fi; fi'
